A Memory Science Field Game
Wandering Waters
You are a field scientist studying a rock formation carved by water. The water is your memory system. The debris in the current is your thoughts and memories in motion.
Your job is to observe, collect, and understand — not to fix anything.
How it works
Read Read the narrative, then choose a response below it
Kit Opens your field kit and collected samples
Log Opens your field report — a live record of your session
⌂ Go home at any time — no cost, no judgment
This game is educational, not therapy. If anything in it becomes distressing, use the home button. If you need support, text or call 988.
